title: Where is Dropdown in creating Custom Automation
excerpt:
I want to create a custom Automation, that when a Dropdown is changed to a certain value it notifies someone.  But I do not see Dropdown in the items to choose from. 
i see a sample recipe that uses Dropdown change to va…

posts.author: wsalling (william salling)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to create a custom Automation, that when a Dropdown is changed to a certain value it notifies someone. But I do not see Dropdown in the items to choose from.
i see a sample recipe that uses Dropdown change to value, but does different steps.

posts.author: RockyB (Michael Rock Balog)
posts.cookedHtml: I also need to use a change in a dropdown to a specific value to create an item in a specific board based on the dropdown value.

posts.author: Bea (Becky Wright)
posts.cookedHtml: I also was hoping to notify via Slack if a certain label was selected in a dropdown column but Monday Help said it was not possible to use in custom automations. Please let us use it!
